paper_title: GemDetox at TextDetox CLEF 2025: Enhancing a Massively Multilingual Model for Text Detoxification on Low-resource Languages

introduction.topic: Text detoxification for digital communication and social media platforms
introduction.problem: Need for moderation and content detoxification strategies to address toxic language, hate speech, and harassment
introduction.context: Multilingual Text Detoxification task at PAN 2025
introduction.task_description: Rewriting toxic text into non-toxic form while preserving meaning across 15 typologically diverse languages
introduction.focus: Explicit toxicity (obscene or offensive lexicon) - implicit toxicity excluded

methodology.approach: Builds on 2024 paradigm of fine-tuning large-scale multilingual pretrained transformer models
methodology.model_selection: Model with extensive multilingual pre-training yet lightweight features

results.key_finding: Data augmentation is especially effective for low-resource languages, narrowing the gap with high-resource counterparts

title: GemDetox at TextDetox CLEF 2025: Enhancing a Massively Multilingual Model for Text Detoxification on Low-resource Languages
